Auto-Detect and Read a Pressure Data File

Source: R/read-auto.R
pr_read_auto.Rd

Inspects the file extension and header, then dispatches to the correct parser.

Usage

pr_read_auto(path, layout = NULL, verbose = TRUE)

Arguments

path

Character. Path to any supported pressure data file.

layout

A pr_layout object. If NULL, inferred by the dispatched parser.

verbose

Logical. Default TRUE.

Value

A pr_trial object (for .asc / .txt / .csv), or a logical mask matrix / pr_mask object (for .msa/.msr/.msp).

Examples

path <- pr_example_files("insole")
tr <- pr_read_auto(path, verbose = FALSE)
inherits(tr, "pr_trial")
#> [1] TRUE
